title: Neon Title No Edition
description: This resource pack changes the title of the main menu to a neon style title without the edition text
body:
![NT](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5cefbcc4062b1cbe8ded3e5cd0a31aa6c6a6834e.png)

This resource pack changes the main menu title to a\
neon style title to give you game that extra bit of flavour.

![Separator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a096a091d3e24ffd3905f5f12b2feb40d5a60a60.png)

If you wish to have a version with the edition text\
click on the following link : [Neon Title](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/neon-title)

![Separator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a096a091d3e24ffd3905f5f12b2feb40d5a60a60.png)

### NOTICE
I only upload versions for 1.20+ so please do not ask for this to be backdated.\
This resource pack will work with any version of minecraft.

If you get annoyed with the red warning when applying out of date resource packs\
then just ignore it or consider using [No Resource Pack Warnings](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-resource-pack-warnings) by Space Walker
